descFull: Track token usage across 22 AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Roo Code, Zed Agent, Goose, and more) — local-first, zero-config, with a beautiful dashboard, native macOS menu bar app, and 4 desktop widgets.
